allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add frontend source files and clean up gitignore

- Add all React/TypeScript source files \(pages, components, hooks, lib\)
- Add frontend config \(package.json, vite.config, tsconfig\)
- Remove node_modules and dist from tracking
- Update .gitignore with proper exclusions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix CORS: add Vercel domain to allowed origins

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
